all.en: Agenda: Q1 Kick-off — Sterling Industries Account
all.zh: 議程：Sterling Industries 客戶 Q1 啟動會議

all.en: Date: February 7, 2026 — 10:00 AM EST
all.zh: 日期：2026 年 2 月 7 日 上午 10:00 EST

all.en: Platform: Microsoft Teams, recurring link in the calendar invite
all.zh: 平台：Microsoft Teams，循環連結附在日曆邀請中

all.en: Good morning everyone, thank you for joining us today
all.zh: 各位早安，感謝今天撥空參與會議

all.en: Before we start, please confirm your audio is working clearly
all.zh: 開始前請確認您的麥克風收音清晰

all.en: I'd like to begin with a quick round of introductions
all.zh: 我想先請大家簡短自我介紹一輪

all.en: My name is Daniel Pierce, your dedicated account manager
all.zh: 我是 Daniel Pierce，您專屬的客戶經理

all.en: I will be your primary point of contact for the next twelve months
all.zh: 未來十二個月我將是您的主要聯絡窗口

all.en: Joining me from our side is Rachel Okonkwo, technical implementation lead
all.zh: 我方也有技術導入主管 Rachel Okonkwo 一同與會

all.en: We also have Vincent Hale, our customer success director
all.zh: 另外還有我們的客戶成功總監 Vincent Hale

all.en: From Sterling Industries, may I invite your team to introduce themselves
all.zh: Sterling Industries 這邊，是否可以請貴公司團隊介紹一下

all.en: Thank you, it's a pleasure to finally put faces to names
all.zh: 謝謝大家，很高興終於能將姓名與面孔對上

all.en: Today's primary goal is to align on the onboarding roadmap
all.zh: 今天主要目標是對齊雙方的導入路線圖

all.en: We will walk through five agenda items in approximately sixty minutes
all.zh: 我們將在約六十分鐘內走完五項議程

all.en: First, a brief recap of the contract scope and deliverables
all.zh: 首先簡短回顧合約範圍與交付項目

all.en: Second, the proposed implementation timeline broken into four phases
all.zh: 第二，分為四階段的建議導入時程

all.en: Third, key stakeholders and their roles on both sides
all.zh: 第三，雙方關鍵利害關係人及其角色分工

all.en: Fourth, success metrics and reporting cadence we recommend
all.zh: 第四，我方建議的成功指標與報表頻率

all.en: Fifth, open questions, concerns, and any requested adjustments
all.zh: 第五，開放提問、疑慮與所需調整事項

all.en: Does the agenda look comprehensive, or shall we add anything
all.zh: 議程是否完整，或需要再追加任何項目

all.en: Great, let's move on to the contract scope summary
all.zh: 很好，讓我們進入合約範圍摘要

all.en: The signed agreement covers our Enterprise Analytics Suite, tier three
all.zh: 已簽署的合約涵蓋我們企業分析套件第三級方案

all.en: It includes unlimited user seats and twenty terabytes of storage
all.zh: 包含不限使用者席次與二十 TB 的儲存空間

all.en: Premium support is bundled with a four-hour response SLA
all.zh: 高級支援已綑綁，並提供四小時回應的服務水準協議

all.en: Now turning to the timeline, phase one runs from February to March
all.zh: 現在轉到時程，第一階段為二月到三月

all.en: Phase one focuses on environment provisioning and security review
all.zh: 第一階段聚焦於環境建置與資安審查

all.en: Phase two, April through May, covers data migration and validation
all.zh: 第二階段為四月至五月，涵蓋資料遷移與驗證

all.en: Phase three, June, is dedicated to user training and pilot rollout
all.zh: 第三階段為六月，專注於使用者訓練與試行佈署

all.en: Phase four, July, marks the full production go-live
all.zh: 第四階段為七月，正式上線進入生產環境

all.en: We have built a two-week buffer between phases three and four
all.zh: 我們在三、四階段間預留了兩週緩衝期

all.en: Does this cadence align with your internal launch expectations
all.zh: 此節奏是否符合貴公司內部上線預期

all.en: Sterling's CIO has flagged April board meetings as a constraint
all.zh: Sterling 的資訊長提到四月董事會是個限制

all.en: Understood, we can shift the migration kickoff one week earlier
all.zh: 了解，我們可將遷移啟動提前一週

all.en: Rachel will circulate a revised Gantt chart by Friday afternoon
all.zh: Rachel 將於週五下午前寄出修訂版甘特圖

all.en: Moving on to stakeholders, who will own day-to-day decisions
all.zh: 接著談利害關係人，誰將負責每日決策

all.en: On our side, Vincent escalates anything above contract scope
all.zh: 我方由 Vincent 負責升級超出合約範圍的事項

all.en: Sterling's project sponsor will be your COO, Marianne Delgado
all.zh: Sterling 的專案發起人為貴公司營運長 Marianne Delgado

all.en: Day-to-day operations will be coordinated by your PM, Aaron Briggs
all.zh: 日常營運將由您方的專案經理 Aaron Briggs 協調

all.en: We recommend weekly status syncs every Thursday at three PM
all.zh: 我們建議每週四下午三點固定狀態同步

all.en: A monthly executive review will be scheduled for the last Tuesday
all.zh: 每月最後一個週二將安排高階主管檢視會議

all.en: Regarding success metrics, we propose three primary KPIs
all.zh: 關於成功指標，我們建議三項主要 KPI

all.en: First, user adoption rate measured at thirty, sixty, and ninety days
all.zh: 第一，於三十、六十、九十天衡量的使用者採用率

all.en: Second, average query response time under two seconds
all.zh: 第二，查詢平均回應時間低於兩秒

all.en: Third, support ticket resolution within the SLA threshold
all.zh: 第三，支援工單在服務水準門檻內解決

all.en: We will publish a dashboard accessible to both teams in real time
all.zh: 我們將提供雙方即時可存取的儀表板

all.en: Are there any additional metrics Sterling would like to track
all.zh: Sterling 是否還有其他想追蹤的指標

all.en: Our finance team has asked about cost-per-active-user trending
all.zh: 我們財務團隊詢問每活躍使用者成本的趨勢

all.en: Noted, we can incorporate that into the monthly executive report
all.zh: 了解，我們可將其納入每月高階主管報告中

all.en: Before we close, are there any remaining concerns or blockers
all.zh: 結束前，是否還有任何疑慮或阻礙事項

all.en: Could you clarify the data residency requirements for our EU subsidiary
all.zh: 可否說明歐盟子公司的資料駐留要求

all.en: Absolutely, our Frankfurt region meets all GDPR localization standards
all.zh: 當然，我們的法蘭克福機房符合所有 GDPR 在地化標準

all.en: Rachel will send the compliance documentation by end of day tomorrow
all.zh: Rachel 將於明日下班前寄出合規文件

all.en: Thank you all for the productive discussion this morning
all.zh: 感謝各位今早富有成效的討論

all.en: Meeting notes and action items will be distributed within two hours
all.zh: 會議紀錄與行動項目將於兩小時內發送

all.en: We look forward to a successful partnership ahead
all.zh: 我們期待未來成功的合作夥伴關係
